nodes.name: Delay Between Messages
nodes.notes: Delay 100ms giữa các tin nhắn để đảm bảo thứ tự

nodes.name: Loop Over Items
nodes.notes: Loop tuần tự qua từng tin nhắn

options.systemMessage:
=## Persona
You are Jenix, the personal AI assistant for Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn (Jay Nguyen) and his GenStaff Company. Your primary role is to act as a specialized consultant, advising potential clients on the AI and Automation services he provides.

## Core Directives
1. *Consult on Services:* Your main goal is to understand the customer's needs and advise them on how Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn's services can help. The core services include:  
   a. *Automation Solutions for Businesses:* Providing custom automation workflows using platforms like n8n and other AI-powered tools.  
   b. *AI & Automation Training:* Offering training programs for individuals and companies on leveraging AI and automation.  
2. *Facilitate Scheduling:* If a potential client expresses strong interest or has complex questions that require direct expertise, proactively offer to schedule a consultation with Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn.

## Conversational Flow
1. *Opening Message:* In the very first message of a new conversation (when chat history is empty), you MUST introduce yourself. The introduction should adapt to the input language. For example:  
   - If the user writes in Vietnamese: "Chào anh/chị, em là Jenix, trợ lý AI của anh Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn. Em có thể giúp anh/chị giải đáp các thắc mắc về dịch vụ và giải pháp Tự động hóa & AI ạ."  
   - If the user writes in English: "Hello, I’m Jenix, the AI assistant of Mr. Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn. I can help answer your questions about AI & Automation services."  
2. *Follow-up Messages:* In all subsequent messages within the same conversation, skip the introduction and go straight to the point, directly answering the user's query.

## Constraints & Rules
1. *Extreme Brevity:* Your responses (after the opening message) must be concise and directly address the user's core question. Eliminate filler words.  
2. *Language Protocol:* Always respond in the same language as the user’s input.  
   - In Vietnamese: Address the customer as "anh" or "chị", and refer to yourself as "em".  
   - In English: Use polite, professional addressing such as "you" and refer to yourself as "I".  

## Tone of Voice
- *Clever & Witty:* Employ a smart and slightly humorous tone.  
- *Friendly & Approachable:* Maintain a warm, welcoming, and helpful demeanor.  
- *Efficient:* Convey competence and respect for the customer's time.  

## Output Format
- Your entire output must be formatted in *Facebook Markdown*.  

## More information and context
### Date and time now: {{ $now }}
### Social Channel
#### Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn (Jay Nguyen)
Website: https://nguyenthieutoan.com  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/nguyenthieutoan  
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nguyenthieutoan  
X (Twitter): https://www.x.com/nguyenthieutoan  
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NguyenThieuToan  
Email: me@nguyenthieutoan.com  

#### GenStaff
Website: https://genstaff.net  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/genstaff.net  
Email: contact@genstaff.net  

## Chat History (DO NOT DELETE)
### Old session chat history: {{ $json.old_session_history }}
### Now session chat history: {{ $json.now_session_history }}

parameters.content:
## Instagram DM Chatbot with AI & Conversation History

This workflow turns your **Instagram Business/Creator account** into a fully automated AI chatbot using **Google Gemini** and **n8n Data Table** for persistent conversation history. Every incoming Direct Message is stored, processed, and replied to automatically — with long replies split and delivered sequentially.

> ⚠️ **Simplified version** — ideal for learning and low-traffic deployments. For production, integrate the Smart Batching and Human Takeover workflows linked in the Upgrade Note.

### How it works
1. **Instagram Webhook** receives incoming DMs and responds to Meta's GET verification challenge.
2. **Is Message?** filters text-only events; **Is from page?** blocks echo from the page itself.
3. **Set Context** extracts `user_id`, `ig_id`, and `access_token` — single config point.
4. New message is saved to **Data Table** as `unprocessed`. Unprocessed rows are merged into one prompt.
5. Last 15 **processed rows** are loaded and formatted as old/current-session history for context.
6. **Gemini AI Agent** generates a reply using the merged message + full session history.
7. Reply is **split** into ≤2000-character chunks and sent sequentially with a 1-second delay.
8. Data Table is **updated**: all rows marked `processed`, AI reply saved, old rows cleaned up.

### Setup
* [ ] Create a **Meta App** → add **Instagram** product.
* [ ] Go to Instagram > **API Setup with credentials** → log in to your IG Business/Creator account → copy the **long-lived Access Token**.
* [ ] Paste the token into **Set Context** (`ig_access_token` field).
* [ ] In Meta App > Instagram > **Webhooks**: paste your n8n production webhook URL + a Verify Token → click Verify.
* [ ] Connect **Google Gemini** (`googlePalmApi`) credential in the AI Agent and LLM nodes.
* [ ] Create the **n8n Data Table** `insert_message` with columns: `user_id`, `page_id`, `user_text`, `page_text`, `processed` (Boolean).
* [ ] Activate the workflow in **production mode BEFORE** verifying the webhook in Meta.

### Customization tips
* **Change AI persona:** Edit the system prompt inside `Process Merged Message` — nothing else needs changing.
* **Switch model:** Swap `Google Gemini Chat Model` for any supported LLM sub-node.
* **Scale up:** Combine with the Smart Batching or Human Takeover workflows for production readiness.

### LICENCE
This template is shared free of charge. Copyright belongs to Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen). Any copying or modification must credit the author.

## Author Message

Hi! I am **Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen)** — a Verified n8n Creator. Thank you for using this template!

This workflow is shared with you for free. If it brings value to your work, optimizes your operations, or saves you time, you can buy me a coffee here: **[My Donate Website](https://nguyenthieutoan.com/payment/)** *(PayPal, Momo, Bank Transfer)*

* Website: [nguyenthieutoan.com](https://nguyenthieutoan.com)
* Email: me@nguyenthieutoan.com
* Company: GenStaff ([genstaff.net](https://genstaff.net))
* Socials (Facebook / X / LinkedIn): @nguyenthieutoan

*Discover more of my automation solutions:* **[Click here](https://n8n.io/creators/nguyenthieutoan/)**

## IMPORTANT: Upgrade for Production

This is a **simplified version** — suitable for learning, testing, or low-traffic use.

For production, combine with these **100% compatible** workflows (originally built for Facebook Messenger, but fully cross-platform — works with Instagram too):

* **[Smart message batching](https://n8n.io/workflows/9192):** Waits for the user to finish typing before responding. Prevents duplicate or out-of-order replies.
* **[Smart human takeover](https://n8n.io/workflows/11920):** Automatically pauses the bot when an admin replies. Resumes when the admin is done.

Integrate **one or both** for a production-ready Instagram chatbot.

## Section 1: Webhook & Validation
Receives Instagram DM events via webhook → returns GET verification challenge to Meta → **Is Message?** filters text-only events → **Is from page?** blocks echo messages sent by the page itself → extracts config into **Set Context**.

## Section 2: Store Message & Load History
Inserts new user message into **Data Table** as `unprocessed` → marks as **Seen** → merges all unprocessed rows into one prompt (simple batching) → retrieves last 15 **processed** rows → formats them into old-session / current-session history blocks for the AI.

## Section 3: AI Processing
Sends `typing_on` indicator to the user → **Gemini AI Agent** generates a reply using the merged message + full session history → **Format Output** normalizes markdown, strips unsupported syntax, and splits the reply into ≤2000-character chunks.

## Section 4: Deliver & Update
Loops through each message chunk → waits 1 second between sends → delivers via **Instagram Graph API** → marks all unprocessed rows `processed = true` → saves AI reply into `page_text` → deletes old history rows beyond the 15-message window.

## Activate before verifying!

The webhook verification in Meta App **only works with the production URL**. Activate this workflow in production mode first, then go to Meta App > Instagram > Webhooks to verify.

## Edit this node!

Replace `ig_access_token` with your **long-lived Instagram Access Token** from:
Meta App > Instagram > API Setup with credentials.
